title: Swipe right, next screen
scenario: Verify that swiping right from the Onboarding screen navigates sequentially through all screens, advancing the dot indicator correctly per the Figma design.
steps: Start from the Onboarding screen (first screen).
Swipe right from the current Onboarding screen.
Verify that the screen advances to the next screen in sequence.
Check that the dot indicator updates to the second dot.
Verify that the screen advances to the third screen.
Check that the dot indicator updates to the third dot.
Verify that the screen advances to the fourth screen.
Check that the dot indicator updates to the fourth dot.
Verify that the screen advances to the fifth screen.
Check that the dot indicator updates to the fifth dot.
Verify that the screen advances to the sixth screen.
Check that the dot indicator updates to the sixth dot.
expected: Swiping right from the Onboarding screen navigates through all screens in sequence, matching the Figma design. After each swipe, the screen advances to the next dot indicator (third screen after step 4, fourth after step 6, fifth after step 8, sixth after step 10).
